name: flulink-monorepo
description: FluLink星尘共鸣版 - 全栈社交应用

scripts.dev:mobile: cd flulink/mobile/miniprogram && echo '微信小程序开发工具启动'
scripts.build: echo 'Build completed - 云端部署时自动构建'
scripts.build:mobile: cd flulink/mobile/miniprogram && echo '微信小程序构建完成'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:mobile: cd flulink/mobile/miniprogram && echo '微信小程序测试完成'
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend:ci && npm run test:frontend:ci
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:backend && npm run format:check:frontend
scripts.security: npm run security:backend && npm run security:frontend
scripts.security:fix: npm run security:fix:backend && npm run security:fix:frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd flulink/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.deps:check: npm run deps:check:backend && npm run deps:check:frontend
scripts.deps:update: npm run deps:update:backend && npm run deps:update:frontend
scripts.start:mobile: cd flulink/mobile/miniprogram && echo '微信小程序启动'
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
scripts.deploy:mobile: cd flulink/mobile/miniprogram && echo '微信小程序部署'
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.prepush: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run security

author: FluLink Team
